title: SID History Added or Failed (Events 4765/4766)
description: Detects SID History modifications via Security events 4765 (SID History was added to an account) and 4766 (an attempt to add SID History failed). Injecting a privileged SID into sidHistory grants stealthy domain dominance.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and ((('Event ID' = '4765' or 'Event ID' = '4766')))
